message:
🐛 Fix nightly WVA E2E tests missing ENVIRONMENT and USE_SIMULATOR env vars (#68)

The 'Run WVA E2E tests' step in both OCP and CKS reusable workflows was
missing ENVIRONMENT, USE_SIMULATOR, and CONTROLLER_INSTANCE env vars.

Without these, the Makefile's test-e2e-full target defaults to:
- ENVIRONMENT=kind-emulator (should be openshift/kubernetes)
- USE_SIMULATOR=true (should be false for real GPU clusters)
- CONTROLLER_INSTANCE='' (should match deployed controller's instance label)

This caused the e2e tests to create simulated model service pods on real
GPU clusters, resulting in the WVA controller not detecting saturation
and never scaling up. The nightly has been failing since Feb 28 when
PR #795 in llm-d/llm-d switched test_target to test-e2e-full.

Fixes: nightly-e2e-wva-ocp and nightly-e2e-wva-cks failures

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -801,6 +801,9 @@ jobs:
           GATEWAY_NAME: infra-${{ inputs.guide_name }}-inference-gateway-istio
           DEPLOYMENT: ms-${{ inputs.guide_name }}-llm-d-modelservice-decode
           WVA_RELEASE_NAME: ${{ env.WVA_RELEASE_NAME }}
+          ENVIRONMENT: kubernetes
+          USE_SIMULATOR: "false"
+          CONTROLLER_INSTANCE: ${{ env.WVA_RELEASE_NAME }}
         run: |
           echo "Running WVA E2E tests (${{ inputs.test_target }}) on CKS..."
           echo "  CONTROLLER_NAMESPACE: $CONTROLLER_NAMESPACE"
@@ -809,6 +812,9 @@ jobs:
           echo "  MODEL_ID: $MODEL_ID"
           echo "  REQUEST_RATE: $REQUEST_RATE"
           echo "  NUM_PROMPTS: $NUM_PROMPTS"
+          echo "  ENVIRONMENT: $ENVIRONMENT"
+          echo "  USE_SIMULATOR: $USE_SIMULATOR"
+          echo "  CONTROLLER_INSTANCE: $CONTROLLER_INSTANCE"
           cd _caller
           make ${{ inputs.test_target }}

@@ -827,6 +827,9 @@ jobs:
           GATEWAY_NAME: infra-${{ inputs.guide_name }}-inference-gateway-istio
           DEPLOYMENT: ms-${{ inputs.guide_name }}-llm-d-modelservice-decode
           WVA_RELEASE_NAME: ${{ env.WVA_RELEASE_NAME }}
+          ENVIRONMENT: openshift
+          USE_SIMULATOR: "false"
+          CONTROLLER_INSTANCE: ${{ env.WVA_RELEASE_NAME }}
         run: |
           echo "Running WVA E2E tests (${{ inputs.test_target }})..."
           echo "  CONTROLLER_NAMESPACE: $CONTROLLER_NAMESPACE"
@@ -836,6 +839,9 @@ jobs:
           echo "  MODEL_ID: $MODEL_ID"
           echo "  REQUEST_RATE: $REQUEST_RATE"
           echo "  NUM_PROMPTS: $NUM_PROMPTS"
+          echo "  ENVIRONMENT: $ENVIRONMENT"
+          echo "  USE_SIMULATOR: $USE_SIMULATOR"
+          echo "  CONTROLLER_INSTANCE: $CONTROLLER_INSTANCE"
           cd _caller
           make ${{ inputs.test_target }}
